productDisplayName: Wrangler Men's Greensboro Raw Edge Black T-shirt
description: CompositionRound neck black t-shirt with chest print, made of 100% cotton and has a stitch detailing on back top panelFittingFittedWash care Light machine wash Do not bleach Warm iron on reverse Do not dry clean Dry flat/ reverse Do not scrub Kickstarting its operations at Greensboro in North Carolina state of the USA, wrangler has grown to fame world over. This tee from wrangler is a tribute to the city that allowed it to set shop and reach dizzying heights. Made of cotton fabric, this t-shirt will keep you dry and comfortable through all seasons, while the stitch detailing on the top panel at the back adds a touch of ruggedness. Don a stylish look by pairing this off-beat grey tee with denim or cargo pants or shorts and comfortable footwear from the wide range available at myntra.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2', Chest-39.5", Waist-32"
